_max_entries_per_day_note: Set to -1 to disable the hard cap and rely on buying power and AI judgment alone.
_separate_spread_entry_note: When true, the put and call spreads are placed as two separate 2-leg limit orders instead of one 4-leg combo. May improve fills on liquid underlyings. Requires partial_entry status handling in stop management.

email._note: SendGrid API key is stored in Windows Credential Manager. Run: python -c "import keyring; keyring.set_password('meicagent', 'sendgrid_api_key', 'YOUR_KEY')" to store it.
